channel.title: mbAInewsletter
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from mbAInewsletter, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Solaris Energy Infrastructure Shares Jump Over 12% Overnight â Here's Why
item.description: Solaris Energy Infrastructure shares jumped 14.6% after hours Thursday following a Master Equipment Rental Agreement. Importance Rank: 1 read more

item.title: I Plan to Claim Social Security at Full Retirement Age Just to Invest the Money. Is This Genius?
item.description: Experts weigh in on how to decide when to claim Social Security benefits and whether it's smart to accelerate that timeline to invest.

item.title: Workday shed $40 billion in value. Founder Aneel Bhusri is back with a $139 million bet he can turn it around
item.description: Workday's compensation plan for its new CEO underscores how much of an uphill fight SaaS companies have in the face of AI.

item.description: "These headphones are fantastic."

item.title: Sam Altmanâs fusion startup Helion Energy hits 150 million degree plasma temperatureâa milestone that could bring first grid power in 2028
item.description: Helion Energy achieves plasma at a stunning 150 million degree Celsius, well above the threshold to eventually generate stable fusion power.
